Verified Reviews

What Your Neighbors Have to Say

Read More Reviews →
S
Sarah M.

Indy Excavating did an amazing job with our foundation excavation in Fishers. They were on time, professional, and very careful to protect our property. The excavation was perfectly level, and the foundation crew had no issues. Highly recommend!

D
David K.

We had Indy Excavating run a new gas line for our outdoor kitchen in Carmel. The job was done quickly and efficiently, and they cleaned up everything afterward. There was a slight delay due to weather, but they communicated well throughout the process.

E
Emily R.

Our backyard in Broad Ripple was always soggy after it rained. Indy Excavating installed a French drain system, and now the water drains perfectly. They were knowledgeable, professional, and reasonably priced. Great service!

J
John S.

Indy Excavating prepared our lot for a new home build in Noblesville. Their team was meticulous and thorough, ensuring a level and stable foundation. They handled all the grading and compaction expertly. I would definitely use them again.

Additional Excavation Contractor Services

Site Preparation Foundation Excavation Utility Trenching Drainage Solutions

Indy Excavating & Utilities — Certified Professionals

Our team brings certified expertise and years of experience to every excavation contractor project. We stand behind our work with comprehensive warranties and a commitment to quality.

More About Us →

The Indy Excavating & Utilities Way

Our proven process ensures every project is completed with precision, transparency, and care.

1

Consultation

We start with a thorough, no-obligation assessment. Our certified team evaluates your needs and provides a detailed report with recommendations.

2

Plan & Prepare

We work with you to determine the best approach for your specific excavation contractor needs. Our experts ensure the right plan for quality results.

3

Get It Done

Our skilled team gets to work with precision and efficiency. We maintain a clean, organized environment and keep you informed every step of the way.

4

Quality Check

Before we consider any job complete, our team performs a comprehensive quality review. We verify every detail meets our exacting standards.

5

Wrap Up

Transparent pricing with no surprises. You only pay when you're 100% satisfied with the work. We offer flexible options to make the process seamless.

Proudly Serving Indianapolis & Beyond

As a locally owned and operated company, we're proud to serve customers throughout Indianapolis, IN and the surrounding communities. Our team brings local expertise and dedication to every project.

Carmel Fishers Noblesville Indianapolis Zionsville Westfield Greenwood Lawrence
Let's Get Started →

Frequently Asked Questions

Get answers to the most common questions about our excavation contractor services.

What does site preparation include?

Site preparation encompasses clearing vegetation, removing obstacles, grading the land to the correct elevation, compacting the soil for stability, and establishing proper drainage to prevent water damage.

Why is site preparation important?

Proper site preparation ensures a solid foundation for construction, preventing structural problems, water damage, and costly repairs down the line. It's a critical step in any building project.

How long does site preparation take?

The duration of site preparation varies depending on the size and complexity of the project, soil conditions, and weather. We'll provide a realistic timeline during the initial assessment.

Built on Indianapolis Values

Contact Indy Excavating & Utilities for a free consultation and estimate. Let's discuss your project today!
